root_text.sn37.30:1.4: Rūpabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, na ca sīlabalena, nāsenteva naṁ, kule na vāsenti.
root_text.sn37.30:1.5: Rūpabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, na ca sīlabalena, nāsenteva naṁ, kule na vāsenti.
root_text.sn37.30:1.6: Rūpabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, ñātibalena ca, na ca sīlabalena, nāsenteva naṁ, kule na vāsenti.
root_text.sn37.30:1.7: Rūpabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, ñātibalena ca, puttabalena ca, na ca sīlabalena, nāsenteva naṁ, kule na vāsenti.
root_text.sn37.30:1.8: Sīlabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, na ca rūpabalena, vāsenteva naṁ, kule na nāsenti.
root_text.sn37.30:1.9: Sīlabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, na ca bhogabalena, vāsenteva naṁ, kule na nāsenti.
root_text.sn37.30:1.10: Sīlabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, na ca ñātibalena, vāsenteva naṁ, kule na nāsenti.
root_text.sn37.30:1.11: Sīlabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, na ca puttabalena, vāsenteva naṁ, kule na nāsenti.
root_text.sn37.30:1.12: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, pañca mātugāmassa balānī”ti.

translation_text.sn37.30:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five powers of a lady.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.3: Attractiveness, wealth, relatives, children, and ethical behavior.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.4: If a lady has the power of attractiveness but not that of ethical behavior, the family will send her away, they won’t accommodate her.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.5: If a lady has the powers of attractiveness and wealth but not that of ethical behavior, the family will send her away, they won’t accommodate her.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.6: If a lady has the powers of attractiveness, wealth, and relatives, but not that of ethical behavior, the family will send her away, they won’t accommodate her.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.7: If a lady has the powers of attractiveness, wealth, relatives, and children, but not that of ethical behavior, the family will send her away, they won’t accommodate her.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.8: If a lady has the power of ethical behavior but not that of attractiveness, the family will accommodate her, they won’t send her away.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.9: If a lady has the power of ethical behavior but not that of wealth, the family will accommodate her, they won’t send her away.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.10: If a lady has the power of ethical behavior but not that of relatives, the family will accommodate her, they won’t send her away.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.11: If a lady has the power of ethical behavior but not that of children, the family will accommodate her, they won’t send her away.
translation_text.sn37.30:1.12: These are the five powers of a lady.”
